summary: Develop an annual or periodic budget with department-level detail, strategic alignment, assumption documentation, and approval workflow.

inputs.name: strategic_priorities
inputs.description: Organization strategic priorities and goals for the budget period.

inputs.name: historical_spend
inputs.description: Historical spending data by department and category.

inputs.name: revenue_targets
inputs.description: Revenue targets and growth assumptions for the budget period.

outputs.name: budget_document
outputs.description: Complete budget with department-level allocations and capital plans.

outputs.name: assumption_tracker
outputs.description: Documented assumptions for all major budget lines.

outputs.name: strategic_alignment_report
outputs.description: Mapping of budget allocations to strategic priorities.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve assumption documentation and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is budget development and not tax planning or investment allocation.
Require strategic priorities, historical spend, and revenue targets before budget construction.
Mark all budget figures as planning estimates and attach disclaimer before external sharing.
End with named human budget owner or reviewer handoff; do not claim budget approval.

steps.action: Build revenue projections from targets, growth assumptions, and historical trends.
Develop department-level expense budgets from historical spend and strategic priorities.
Integrate budget with cash flow projections to assess liquidity and timing impacts.
Compile revenue, expense, and cash flow budgets into a complete package with strategic alignment mapping.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read historical spend data, strategic priorities, and revenue targets.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the budget document and supporting schedules when requested.

verification.method: Check budget includes department-level allocations with assumptions.
Check major allocations are mapped to strategic priorities.
Check output includes disclaimer and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The budget includes department-level detail with documented assumptions.
Major allocations are mapped to strategic priorities.
The final output explicitly states it is a planning document and requires human budget owner approval.

rollback.when: If budget is incomplete or assumptions are undocumented, revert to the relevant step.
